title: Connect to Diariz
intro: {{client}} wants to connect to your Diariz account. If you allow it, it will be able to:
permRead: Search and read your meetings, transcripts, minutes, and action items.
permEmail: Email content to your own account address (it can never email anyone else).
revokeNote: You can revoke this connection at any time in Preferences.
unknownClient: This connection request is not valid. Try connecting again from the app.
consentFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.
missingRequest: This page was opened without a connection request.
